index.name: CRISIL Liquid Fund Index
index.description: India's first (2003) and largest liquid ETF providing institutional-grade cash management via exchange-traded mechanism. LIQUIDBEES bridges gap between savings account (0.5% yield) and fixed deposits (6-7% yield with lock-in). Invests exclusively in 91-day-or-less instruments (T-bills, CPs, CDs) ensuring minimal interest rate risk. Daily rebalancing competes with money market funds, offering superior liquidity (trades NSE 09:15-15:30 with market-simulated pricing vs mutual funds settling T+1). Daily dividend reinvested as additional units creates compounding effect. Yield currently 6.5-7% (tracks RBI repo rate minus 10-30 bps). Perfect for traders needing overnight cash parking, corporations managing working capital, and retail investors seeking savings-like accessibility with money market returns. During RBI hike cycles, LIQUIDBEES yield rises synchronously; during cuts, yield compresses creating mark-to-market losses offset by lower coupon reinvestment rates.

holdings.name: Treasury Bills (91-day)
holdings.description: Short-term Government of India securities with zero credit risk. 91-day T-bills auctioned by RBI weekly. Sovereign backing provides absolute safety. Yields track RBI repo rate with minimal duration risk.

holdings.name: Commercial Paper — AAA
holdings.description: Top-rated (A1+) unsecured promissory notes issued by blue-chip corporates like Reliance, TCS, HDFC and PSU entities. Short tenure of 15-90 days. Higher yield than T-bills (~25-50 bps) with minimal credit risk.

holdings.name: Certificate of Deposit
holdings.description: Negotiable money market instruments issued by scheduled commercial banks (HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Kotak). 7-91 day tenure. RBI-regulated and highly liquid. Credit risk very low given systemic importance of issuing banks.

holdings.name: Cash & Tri-party Repo
holdings.description: Overnight tri-party repos on government securities and CBLO (Collateralized Borrowing & Lending Obligations) for same-day settlement, daily operational liquidity and buffer for unexpected large redemptions.

name: ICICI Prudential BSE Liquid Rate ETF- IDCW

index.name: S&P BSE Liquid Rate Index
index.description: ICICI Prudential BSE Liquid Rate ETF- IDCW tracks the S&P BSE Liquid Rate Index index.

holdings.name: Tri-Party Repo (TREPS)
holdings.description: Overnight tri-party repo transactions collateralised by G-Secs, T-Bills and SDL via Clearing Corporation of India (CCIL). Lowest-risk, same-day liquidity. Rate closely tracks RBI repo rate (currently ~6.25-6.50%).

holdings.name: 91-Day Treasury Bills
holdings.description: Short-dated Government of India T-Bills maturing in 91 days. Zero default risk, issued weekly by RBI at cut-off yields (~6.5-6.7%). Provide predictable short-term return slightly above overnight TREPS.

holdings.name: Certificate of Deposit — HDFC Bank
holdings.description: Short-term certificate of deposit issued by HDFC Bank (rated A1+). CDs offer marginally higher yield than T-Bills. Maximum 1-year tenor per SEBI Liquid ETF norms. Settled via CCIL.

holdings.name: Commercial Paper — Reliance Retail
holdings.description: Short-term commercial paper (CP) issued by Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd (rated A1+) backed by Reliance Industries. CPs offer 5-10 bps higher yield than equivalent CDs. Maximum 91-day tenor per Liquid ETF guidelines.

holdings.name: 182-Day Treasury Bills
holdings.description: Government of India T-Bills maturing in 182 days. Slightly higher yield than 91-day T-Bills while retaining sovereign credit quality. Auctioned fortnightly by RBI.

holdings.name: Commercial Paper — Reliance Retail
holdings.description: Short-term commercial paper (CP) issued by Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd (rated A1+) backed by Reliance Industries. CPs offer 5-10 bps higher yield than equivalent CDs. Maximum 91-day tenor per Liquid ETF guidelines.

holdings.name: 182-Day Treasury Bills
holdings.description: Government of India T-Bills maturing in 182 days. Slightly higher yield than 91-day T-Bills while retaining sovereign credit quality. Auctioned fortnightly by RBI.
